arts.ttl: BBC pundit makes “awkward” Leeds United, Millwall prediction amid “huge” promotion concern
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Championship rivals Millwall to Elland Road on Saturday afternoon in the FA Cup, as Daniel Farke eyes progress again to the Fifth Round. Both Leeds and Millwall are likely to rotate their lineups significantly this weekend with league form a priority in the second half of the season, but victories for Farke and Alex Neil would be ideal.

arts.ttl: ‘Last chance to fulfil dream’ – Summer move to Leeds United can see ambitions satisfied
arts.sum: Leeds United have been linked with a move for Borussia Monchengladbach’s Nico Elvedi over the past few weeks. He was said to be a January target for the Whites but a move never went through. There was even an insistence that manager Daniel Farke was pushing to sign the defender. arts.ttl: Millwall injury latest as six players could miss Leeds United FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Ryan Leonard has been sidelined with a calf injury for the last couple of weeks, while Josh Coburn continues to recover from a broken metatarsal he suffered in December. Neil confirmed that Femi Azeez is now available after being sidelined with a fitness issue that he suffered in the FA Cup win over Dagenham & Redbridge last month.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke wowed by “unbelievable” Leeds United man who trains like it’s the UCL final
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is setting the standards high right now for his side, knowing that he can’t take the foot off the gas despite a five-point lead to third place. His impact has largely been seen off the pitch though, ensuring that the high demands set by Farke are instilled into the rest of the squad.

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve got plenty of time to get my career back where I want it’ - in-depth with Millwall attacker Aaron Connolly
arts.sum: I’m performing at the moment and hopefully that can keep going because the club did take a gamble, at the end of the day. Aaron Connolly is loving life at Millwall and determined that his performances land him a longer-term stay in SE16.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss Alex Neil confident his squad can handle hostile Leeds atmosphere
arts.sum: Millwall boss Alex Neil has looked forward to his side’s visit to Elland Road for Saturday’s FA Cup Fourth round clash against Leeds, stating his confidence that any players who are brought into the side are ready to handle the occasion. “I don’t look at any team that I could put out that wouldn’t be able to handle that atmosphere,” said Neil.

arts.ttl: Secret behind Leeds United's unbeaten run, Farke's Elland Road song and FA Cup rotation
arts.sum: Cut out no end of balls to spark the transition. Will feel annoyed he could only lob the ball into the goalkeeper's arms amid a good chance in the first half.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United team vs Millwall with Farke to make wholesale changes
arts.sum: Predicted United XI for Millwall (4-2-3-1): Darlow; Schmidt, Struijk, Wober, Byram; Guilavogui, Ampadu; Gnonto, Rothwell, Ramazani; Joseph. There is also a distinct possibility that Farke could select a brand new back four, with Sam Byram, Isaac Schmidt, Pascal Struijk and Max Wober all waiting in the wings for a chance to stake a claim.

arts.ttl: Leeds United summer transfer window deal for Premier League player hinges on one major condition
arts.sum: While Solomon has refused to rule out a permanent move to Elland Road this summer, a potential deal for the player could hinge on what division the Whites are playing in next year. “In my mind, I want to get back to the Premier League where I belong.
